extension.description: During playback, searches every configured Stremio addon that declares a 'subtitles' resource (shared with Relay) for the currently playing IMDB title and offers the results in Kodi's subtitle dialog.
extension.news: v0.1.18 - Auto-download now RETRIES the subtitle search (within the id window) instead of giving up after one try, so a binge into the next episode reliably loads your language instead of keeping Kodi's embedded forced track. v0.1.17 - URL-decode the playing filename before parsing (AIOStreams & other sources percent-encode it), so titles like "The Punisher One Last Kill" resolve. v0.1.16 - Better filename identification: strip scene site-tags and accept a Cinemeta match on year + name-contained-in-filename, so messy release names (e.g. "...A Marvel Television Special Presentation -- The Punisher One Last Kill 2026...") resolve. Icon at add-on root. v0.1.14 - GPL license, disclaimer; Cinemeta filename resolver; boot-race retry.
extension.disclaimer: Relay is an independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with the Kodi/XBMC Foundation or Stremio. It ships no media, content or stream sources - it only presents add-ons that you choose to install. Do not use it for piracy or to access content you are not authorised to.
